context: Tests whether the agent implements atomic multi-step database operations using Ecto.Multi with named steps, uses Repo.transaction for atomicity, implements idiomatic Ecto upserts with on_conflict/conflict_target, and uses Ecto.build_assoc to create associated records from a parent struct. The scenario covers four key skill instructions that agents often implement incorrectly by using alternatives (manual transactions, get-then-update, manual foreign key assignment).

checklist.name: Ecto.Multi used
checklist.description: The subscribe_user function (or equivalent) uses Ecto.Multi.new() to build a multi-step operation, not just a bare Repo.transaction with function argument

checklist.name: Named Multi steps
checklist.description: The Ecto.Multi pipeline names each step using atoms (e.g. Ecto.Multi.insert(:subscription, ...) and Ecto.Multi.insert(:billing_record, ...))

checklist.name: Multi error tuple pattern
checklist.description: Error result from Repo.transaction() is pattern-matched as {:error, step_name, changeset, _changes} (with a named step atom and four elements), not just {:error, changeset}

checklist.name: Repo.transaction called
checklist.description: The Ecto.Multi pipeline is executed via Repo.transaction/1

checklist.name: on_conflict option used
checklist.description: The upsert_plan function (or equivalent) calls Repo.insert with an on_conflict: option specifying which fields to replace on conflict

checklist.name: conflict_target option used
checklist.description: The upsert_plan function (or equivalent) includes a conflict_target: option pointing to the :code field (or equivalent unique key)

checklist.name: Ecto.build_assoc used
checklist.description: The event-creation function calls Ecto.build_assoc(subscription, :subscription_events) (or the correct association name) to build the associated record from the parent struct

checklist.name: Schema associations
checklist.description: Subscription schema includes has_many :subscription_events and/or has_many :billing_records; child schemas include belongs_to :subscription

checklist.name: Changeset validations
checklist.description: At least one schema module uses both cast/3 and validate_required/2 in its changeset function

checklist.name: timestamps() present
checklist.description: All schema modules include timestamps() in their schema block
